data.name: numericBoxFittingRange.ToolTip
data.value: Set the fitting range (radius) in pixels.

data.name: radioButtonMultiGrain.ToolTip
data.value: Search for multiple crystal grain orientations

data.name: buttonIdentifySpots.ToolTip
data.value: Identify spots (you need to select an appropriate crystal in main window)

data.name: checkBoxDetailsOfFunction.ToolTip
data.value: Show detailed parameters of the fitting function

data.name: numericBoxCameraLength.ToolTip1
data.value: Camera length for the diffraction pattern (mm)

data.name: checkBoxIgnoreMultipleDiffraction.ToolTip
data.value: Ignore systematic absences caused by multiple diffraction

data.name: toolStripMenuItem5.Text
data.value: Left double click : Add a spot

data.name: radioButtonSingleGrain.ToolTip
data.value: Search for a single crystal grain orientation

data.name: numericBoxCameraLength.ToolTip
data.value: Camera length for the diffraction pattern (mm)

data.name: numericBoxFittingRange.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the fitting range (radius) in pixels.

data.name: checkBoxShowCalcSpotLabel.ToolTip
data.value: Show index labels on calculated spots

data.name: checkBoxDetailsOfSpot.ToolTip
data.value: Show detailed information for the selected spot

data.name: checkBoxShowObsSpotSymbol.ToolTip
data.value: Show marker symbols on observed spots

data.name: numericBoxNearestNeighbor.ToolTip
data.value: Minimum distance between spots in pixel unit

data.name: buttonResetRangeForAllSpots.ToolTip
data.value: Apply the current fitting range to all spots.

data.name: buttonRefineThicknessAndDirection.ToolTip
data.value: Refine crystal thickness and beam direction

data.name: toolStripMenuItem4.Text
data.value: Ctrl + Left double click : Add the direct spot

data.name: numericBoxNumberOfSpots.ToolTip1
data.value: Specify the number of spots to detect

data.name: checkBoxGuideCircles.ToolTip
data.value: Show guide circles on the diffraction pattern

data.name: buttonGlobalFit.ToolTip
data.value: Perform global fitting of all spot positions (experimental)

data.name: numericBoxAcceptableError.ToolTip1
data.value: Maximum acceptable error for spot matching

data.name: buttonFindSpots.ToolTip
data.value: Detect diffraction spots in the loaded image and fit them with the selected function. Specify the number of spots to search, the minimum distance between spots, and the fitting range in the box on the right.

data.name: buttonCopyToClipboard.ToolTip
data.value: Copy the above information to the clipboard.

data.name: checkBoxShowObsSpotLabel.ToolTip
data.value: Show index numbers on observed spots

data.name: checkBoxShowDebyeRing.ToolTip
data.value: Overlay Debye-Scherrer rings on the pattern

data.name: buttonCopmprehensiveFitting.ToolTip
data.value: Re-fit positions and intensities of all detected spots

data.name: checkBoxShowCalcSpotSymbol.ToolTip
data.value: Show marker symbols on calculated spots

data.name: numericBoxNearestNeighbor.ToolTip1
data.value: Minimum distance between spots in pixel unit

data.name: numericBoxNumberOfSpots.ToolTip
data.value: Specify the number of spots to detect

data.name: numericBoxMaxGrainNum.ToolTip
data.value: Maximum number of grain orientations to search

data.name: checkBoxShowZoneAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Display the zone axis direction on the pattern

data.name: numericBoxAcceptableError.ToolTip
data.value: Maximum acceptable error for spot matching

data.name: toolStripMenuItem3.Text
data.value: Ctrl + Right click : Remove the spot

data.name: numericBoxMaxGrainNum.ToolTip1
data.value: Maximum number of grain orientations to search
